- [ ] `npm test` passes

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `README.md` updated (if adding a new flag, command, or check)
